# ArcherLab IT Story
> IT history timeline hub covering computers, networks, operating systems, databases, web servers, and web development.

## About
ArcherLab IT Story is an educational timeline hub for developers, students, and curious readers. It organizes major milestones in computing and software history into readable chronological pages.

## Topics
- Computer history
- Network and internet history
- Operating system history
- Database history
- Web development history
- Web server and WAS history
- Frontend, backend, and web interaction timelines

## Features
- Korean and English timeline pages
- Structured historical summaries
- Topic-specific pages for core IT domains
- Search-friendly educational content
- Built as a static browser site

## Links
- Home: https://itstory.archerlab.dev/
- English home: https://itstory.archerlab.dev/index-en.html
- Sitemap: https://itstory.archerlab.dev/sitemap.xml
- Developer: https://archerlab.dev

## Languages
- Korean (한국어)
- English

## Category
IT History, Computer Science, Developer Education, Technology Timeline
